docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOREMAN & BRASSO, A PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT AVOCET, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-21-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-24-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-01-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-21-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-21-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-23-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF ATTORNEY R. FOREMAN IN OPPOSITION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: SANCTIONS/DISMISSAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOREMAN & BRASSO, A PARTNERSHIP
OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-23-1995, CONTINUED TO DEC-13-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE OR DISMISSAL. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
